sourceMovie.title: Uglies
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Uglies for the same reason it broke through in 2024: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a adventure rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. McG keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The science fiction and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Divergent
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Uglies clicked for you, Divergent (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Uglies?
faq.answer: Try Divergent, The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 2, Oblivion—each shares DNA with Uglies while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Uglies?
faq.answer: Uglies (2024) is best described as Science Fiction, Adventure, Action. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Uglies worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this science fiction lane.
